content.en:
The Yuanji Abyss is the eternal heaven and earth after the shattering, it was once called the Yuanji Realm, and after it was broken, it was called the Yuanji Abyss.

At its peak, the Yuan Extreme Realm was even more powerful than the Tianlin Realm, and it was even older than the Tianlin Realm, and at its peak, a total of nearly 100 supreme beings were born.

As a result, a great battle broke the eternal Yuan Extreme Realm, and many Supreme Beings fell, which eventually caused the situation of the Yuan Extreme Abyss.

After the formation of the Yuanji Abyss, the rules changed, resulting in the Supreme being no longer able to stay in the Wuji Abyss, and if they forcibly entered the Wuji Abyss, they would even fall.

As a result, the Yuanji Abyss has become a treasure land for the invincible, and it is also a forbidden land.

The Yuanji Abyss is very dangerous, not only the fight between the invincible, but also the threat from the Abyss Tribulation Beasts.

There are no robbers in the eternal world, but the Yuanji Abyss gave birth to the Abyss Tribulation Beast, this kind of abyssal beast is different from the tribulation beasts of the exotic world, the tribulation beasts of the exotic world will only appear when the exotic world is destroyed, and the next tribulation will fall asleep again.

The abyssal beasts of the Abyss of the Extreme Abyss of Keyuan have been awakening and wandering, and many of them are comparable to the 100,000 Tribulation Beasts, and their strength is extremely powerful.

Therefore, once the weak invincible person enters the Yuanji Abyss, it is almost certain to die, so everyone forms a team to enter the Yuanji Abyss.

There are many opportunities in the Yuanji Abyss, such as regular celestial objects, and some precious resources, and even eternal source objects were once born.

Moreover, when the Yuan Extreme Realm was shattered, countless strong people fell, so there were also many relics and inheritances of the strong there, and even the inheritance of the supreme ones.

There are also invincible people who have had a chance in the Yuanji Abyss and have become supreme.

For the invincible people of some exotic worlds in the vicinity, the Yuanji Abyss is undoubtedly where they hope to become a powerhouse.

There are two routes to enter the Yuanji Abyss, one is to enter directly from the Source Sea, and the other is to enter through the third-order gate.

Right now, the exotic world where Ye Tian is located is an exotic world that has been transformed, integrated into the rules of the Yuanji Abyss, and is one of the subordinate exotic worlds of the Yuanji Abyss, and the advantage of this is that it can accommodate first-class invincibles.

However, the Supreme One still cannot enter this foreign world.

Through this exotic world, the invincible can easily enter the Yuanji Abyss, there are many passages here, but if you pass through these passages, you need to pay some origin rules to rob the crystal, which is the rule set by the forces that occupy this place.

It is said that this is a joint construction by some eternal name-level and countless saint-level forces, and no one dares to break the rules here.

With a general understanding of the situation, Ye Tian paid some Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, passed through a void channel, and entered the Yuan Extreme Abyss.

-------------------

Rumble!!!!

The endless suppression struck, making Ye Tian feel the rules similar to the Source Sea, but unlike the Source Sea, it turned into countless spaces.

"Yuanji Abyss, it's here!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The position he is in now is the outermost layer of the Yuanji Abyss, there are no resources here, it has already been carved up, coupled with the constraints of the major forces, so this layer of space is very safe, if you want to leave the Yuanji Abyss, you can leave from the void passage here and return to the exotic worlds.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to go deep into the Yuan Extreme Abyss.

According to the mission instructions, they need to place the mystery box in the designated location of the Yuanji Abyss, and where to put the distance, they need to contact a certain powerhouse in the Yuanji Abyss of the Tianfeng Sea.

"That's it!"

According to the instruction map, Ye Tian came to a certain layer of the outer layer of the Yuanji Abyss, and after confirming that the coordinates were located in this layer, he took out a communicator and began to transmit the message to a certain powerhouse in the Tianfeng Sea.

Soon, a voice came from the other end of the transmitter.

"Put the things where they are, and leave here, don't return to the Tianlin Realm yet, you can wait in the nearby Exotic World. "

Ye Tian followed the instructions, put down the mystery box, and left.

Obviously, Tianfeng Hai is also worried that these invincible members on a mission will betray Tianfeng Hai and thus set a trap, so if the other party senses that he is still there, he will not come to take the mystery box, and his mission will not be completed.

After Ye Tian left, a first-class invincible came here, reached out and picked up the mysterious box, and after taking a look, he put it away casually, and then tore through the layers of space and disappeared.

......

Ye Tian did not leave the Yuanji Abyss, but continued to copy the talent of an invincible person on the outermost layer of the Yuanji Abyss, there were too many invincibles here, there were always invincible people coming in, and there were also invincible people leaving.

If he copied their Ultimate Ancestral Endowment and fused it into the Eternal Ancestral Endowment, he would have even more Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

As for treasure hunting or something, he has no interest for the time being, after all, his strength is really nothing here, and it is easy to fall.

Once he falls, his loss is not small, at least these copied talents are really gone, unless he sends the copied body again to re-replicate.

As time passed, one after another fourth-rank invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea came with mysterious boxes.

Eventually, a squad descended on the Yuanji Abyss.

This is the secret team that Tianfeng Hai secretly cultivated, and the strength of each invincible person is very strong, and they are all able to kill the third-class invincible with a fourth-rank invincible, all of them are geniuses among geniuses, and they are all invincible people who have been promoted from the Nine Tribulations Realm with their flesh bodies.

However, there are only six people left in the ten-person team at present, and four genius invincibles have fallen, and the other six invincibles have also been injured.

There is no way, the strength of the ten of them is too strong, no matter how clumsy they are, they are still found to be wrong, so they are surrounded and suppressed by the Netherworld Temple more.

Once, they were surrounded by dozens of third-class invincibles, even if they were suppressed badly, but after all, they were all third-class invincibles, in addition to these third-class invincibles, there were many fourth-class invincibles.

If it weren't for the powerful weapons and secret treasures given to them by Tianfeng Hai, they would have been able to escape the six of them in the end, otherwise they would all be dead.

After paying a heavy price, the six of them finally broke out of the encirclement and came here.

After entering the Yuanji Abyss, they immediately contacted a first-class invincible person in the Heavenly Wind Sea.

Soon, the invincible of the first class appeared.

"I've seen the Chenling Supreme!"

The six invincibles said respectfully.

"You have fallen four?" said the Chen Ling Supreme with a frown.

"Yes!" replied the six invincibles.

"Good work!" Chen Ling Supreme sighed.

In his eyes, these six invincible people all have hope of being promoted to first-class invincibles in the future, but now they have lost four people, which is indeed a huge loss for Tianfeng Hai, but compared to the plan, this loss is still worth it.

"Give me all the boxes!"

The six invincibles nodded and handed over the ten boxes, and the other four were handed over to them despite the fall.

Because they don't know which box has the quest items in them, they can only keep them all.

The Chen Ling Supreme took the ten boxes and let the six of them hide in the nearby Exotic World, and then went to the depths of the Yuanji Abyss alone.

There, the leader of the Heavenly Wind Sea is besieged by many first-class invincibles in the Netherworld Temple, and he needs to unite the first-class invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea here to rush into the leader, hand over the Eternal Source to the leader, and help the leader complete the final breakthrough and become the supreme.
